What We Do

Full Service. Custom Results.

From routine maintenance to a full custom wheel fitment — B&G Customs handles every aspect of your build.

🏎️
Custom Wheel Fitment

We spec, source, and mount the right wheel and tire combo. Vellano, Forgiato, Rucci, AG Wheels, CPC, and Billet Specialty in stock and on order.

CALL FOR PRICING
Get a Quote →
🛞
Tires — Mount & Balance

Nitto, Pirelli, Continental, and more. Mount, balance, and TPMS service. Winter changeover packages available seasonally.

FROM $25/WHEEL
Book Service →
🛑
Brake Services

Pads, rotors, calipers, and brake fluid flush. Quality parts for every make and model.

FROM $89
Book Service →
🔩
Oil Change & Maintenance

Conventional, synthetic, and high-mileage oil changes. Includes multi-point inspection. Quick in-and-out service.

FROM $39
Book Service →
🔬
Diagnostics & Engine

Check engine light? We scan, diagnose, and explain every code in plain English before we touch anything.

FROM $75
Book Service →
🎨
Wraps & Appearance

Paint protection, ceramic coating, and wrap services. Keep your build looking as sharp as the wheels.

CALL FOR PRICING
